sourceRef: tip:Handling a late-term credit change cleanly

slides.headline: Clean Up Late-Term Credit Changes
slides.body: Stay compliant and protect student eligibility.

slides.headline: Document the Drop
slides.body: First, immediately document the student's drop and any outstanding credits.

slides.headline: File the Claim
slides.body: Submit the claim within 30 days for any credits that need to be reversed.
bullets: Review VA guidance on credit adjustments

slides.headline: Verify and Confirm
slides.body: Verify the credit adjustment and confirm with the student.

slides.headline: Document the Drop
slides.body: First, immediately document the student's drop and any outstanding credits.

slides.headline: File the Claim
slides.body: Submit the claim within 30 days for any credits that need to be reversed.
bullets: Review VA guidance on credit adjustments

slides.body: Learn more about automating your compliance process. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay compliant and protect student eligibility by handling late-term credit changes with these two-step recovery steps. Document the drop, file the claim, and follow-up. Learn more about automating your compliance process. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Verify and Confirm' slide could benefit from a clearer call to action to ensure the user understands the next step.
